_description: Scheduled one-off campaigns dispatched by scripts/cron/newsletter-dispatch.ts. Each entry runs once when scheduledAt has passed; CampaignSendLock keeps it idempotent forever. Add new entries here and commit.
_endpointRequirement: endpoint must be an HTTP route on the local Next.js daemon that accepts Bearer CRON_SECRET and triggers the campaign send. Mother's Day wrapper lives at POST /api/admin/campaigns/mothers-day (body: {emailNumber: 1|2|3}). Vinted campaign permanently rejected by owner — see NEVER_ADD_VINTED_CAMPAIGN.md.
